codeReview.summary: The fix comprehensively addresses all three original blocking issues: (1) SHA-256 replaced with bcrypt for password hashing with proper salt rounds, (2) login_attempts table added with load/save/remove functions to persist lockout state across restarts, (3) MAX_SESSION_LIFETIME (60 min) enforced server-side in validateSession/refreshSession with proper expired flag handling. Legacy SHA-256 hash migration path included for existing data. No new blocking issues introduced.

summary: PASS - All three blocking security issues from user-management-app have been fixed: bcrypt replaces SHA-256, login lockout persists to database, and server-side 60-minute max session lifetime is enforced. The fix is comprehensive and includes proper client-side handling for expired sessions.
